SELECT u.name, COUNT(o.id) as order_count FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY u.name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 10;

## Bug Fix: Authentication Token Refresh

The issue was caused by a race condition in the token refresh logic. When multiple concurrent requests detected an expired token, they would all initiate refresh calls simultaneously.

### Changes
- Added a mutex lock around the refresh flow
- Queued concurrent callers to await the single refresh result
- Added retry logic with exponential backoff

### Testing
- Unit test for concurrent refresh scenarios
- Integration test with mock auth server

- Maximum 10,000 rows per export
- Show progress indicator for large exports
